sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_portal"> <sys_portal action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <dropzone/> <offset/> <page display_value="PA My Tasks">af8e6fe04f005300303dc3818110c762</page> <summary>Tasks by State Owned by Me</summary> <sys_created_by>KTorres</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2019-08-27 14:46:23</sys_created_on> <sys_id>46ca60d1db23f740c448d1c2ca9619e6</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>KTorres</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2019-08-27 14:46:23</sys_updated_on> </sys_portal> </record_update>
